warnings: This is eave/fascia detail R2, referenced from section รูปตัด2 (หน้า09_section2.json, callout 'เชิงชาย 2 (R2)').

The vertical marker letter 'E' at the bottom of this detail does not match any letter in the building's main gridline set (D,C,B,A) or the dummy-grid set in the master gridline file — this strongly suggests it is a generic local reference letter for this detail drawing only, NOT a proposal for a new building dummy grid. Flagging rather than adding to grid master, since it doesn't look like a real structural coordinate (R1's page uses 'B' which IS a real grid letter, but R2's 'E' is not, so these are likely just arbitrary per-detail axis labels, not a consistent grid reference scheme).
Sibling detail R1 is in _หน้า14_eave_r1.json.
